global.title: Global Environment Sensors
global.description: Configure sensors shared across all rooms. The weather entity must support hourly forecasts (wind_speed is extracted from forecast array).

devices.title: Device Sensors
devices.description: Configure sensors that track cooling device states for this room

targets.title: Target Settings
targets.description: Configure target temperature, time, and tolerance for this room

data.target_time_entity: Target time helper (input_datetime) - when to reach target
data.tolerance_minutes: Tolerance past target time (minutes) - prefer fan/window over AC if within this window
data.comfort_end_entity: Comfort window end time (input_datetime) - wake time / end of overnight comfort period (optional)
data.comfort_tolerance: Comfort tolerance (°F) - how far above target is still acceptable during the comfort window
data.prefer_ac_during_comfort: Prefer AC during comfort window - run AC overnight to maintain comfort (disable for quiet bedrooms or rooms without AC)
data.peak_schedule: Peak electricity schedule (optional) - schedule entity where 'on' = peak/expensive hours (e.g. 3 PM–9 PM). AC will be deferred to off-peak when time permits.

error.room_already_configured: A room with this name is already configured

room_settings.title: Room Settings
room_settings.description: Configure sensors and targets for this room

global_settings.title: Global Settings
global_settings.description: These settings are shared across all rooms
